productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Check Green Shirt
description: Composition Green and black check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket with a button closure on the chest, a spread collar with a buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring, dry clean or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Top notch style and comfort, this shirt from united colors of benetton is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. The design and attention to detail is sure to earn you accolades, while the fabric will keep you fresh all day. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
